title: Usage & Metering Explorer
description: Metered usage data across all tenants: active users, API calls, storage consumption, and other billable dimensions. Read-only surface — no state-changing actions. Usage metering aggregates never contain PHI. Operator question: 'How much resource usage has each tenant consumed relative to their subscription tier?' No VistA equivalent — platform-native commercial analytics surface.

dataSources.description: Per-tenant metered usage: active users, API calls, storage, and other billable dimensions relative to subscription tier limits.
